title: helichrysum niveum
intro: Helichrysum niveum, also known as White Ice Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Western Cape Province in South Africa. Helichrysum niveum is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
